name: Eval design
when_to_use: Name the failure modes and design the smallest eval that gates the change

name: Judge calibration
when_to_use: Calibrate an LLM-as-judge against a human-labeled set before it gates anything

name: Trajectory tests
when_to_use: Reassemble spans and assert on the path — tool order, hand-offs, loops

name: Benchmark design
when_to_use: Build a held-out, replayable benchmark that gates a model swap or release

name: Activation evals
when_to_use: Test whether an agent/skill activates and routes correctly (positive/negative/edge)
